---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a kernel-owned capability or contract improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed change.

## Kernel Ownership Check

Explain why this belongs in `rehydration-kernel` and not in an integrating
product.

## Contract Impact

- [ ] No public contract impact
- [ ] gRPC contract change
- [ ] Async contract change
- [ ] Runtime integration change
- [ ] Documentation only

## Architecture Notes

Confirm the proposal respects:

- DDD
- hexagonal boundaries
- no god objects or files
- no product-specific nouns in the kernel boundary

## Alternatives

What alternatives did you consider?
